articles.title: DOT Reaches New All-Time High as Polkadot Braces for Multiple Project Launches in 2021
articles.description: Polkadot has witnessed a massive surge in price by almost +37.9% in the last 24 hours, driving the market cap to $10 billion, bringing it to a new all-time high at $12.74. Uniswap Now Has More Than $3 Billion in Liquidity
articles.description: Uniswap’s liquidity is surging. At press time, the decentralized exchange had $3.18 billion of liquidity. Uniswap Liquidity on the Rise Uniswap has reached this milestone without having any liquidity incentive program currently active. Paxos adopts Chainlink oracles to further adoption of PAX and PAXG tokens
articles.description: Paxos, a crypto brokerage and infrastructure platform, today announced it is now working with Chainlink to leverage its market-leading decentralized oracle network. articles.description: Polkadot saw a superb 38% price explosion over the past 24 hours as the coin hits $12.70. Against Bitcoin, DOT rebounded from support at 21,100 SAT this week and is now above 33,400 SAT.

articles.title: Stellar blockchain selected by German real estate group to issue $24 million bond
articles.description: The Stellar blockchain has been the go-to blockchain for the European real estate group – Vanovia for issuing a €20 million [$24 million] bond. According to the announcement, this three-year bond will be deployed using Stellar blockchain to issue security tokens for the transfer of real estate rights.
